data.title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Credits Contrarian Strategy For 350% Stock Surge: 'If You Sue The US Government...'
data.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp attributes the company's success to ignoring critics and staying focused on building essential software tools.

data.title: Steve Jobs Was 'Somewhere In The Middle' Of Perfectionist Leader And Unforgiving 'Screaming Lunatic,' Says Marc Andreessen
data.description: Marc Andreessen described Steve Jobs as a demanding yet transformative force with high standards and deep respect for quality.

data.title: Donald Trump's 145% Tariffs On China Could Disrupt Tesla's Cybercab, Semi Production: Report
data.description: Tesla's production plans for the Cybercab and Semi have been affected by the Trump administration's tariffs on Chinese imports.

data.title: Trump Administration Imposes Up To 245% Tariff On Chinese Imports Amid Intensifying Trade Battle
data.description: President Donald Trump's administration has raised tariffs on Chinese imports by 245% after a 145% levy earlier.

data.title: Satya Nadella Says Microsoft's New Tool Allows Anyone To Create AI Agents That Click, Type, And Navigate On Your Computer For You
data.description: Microsoft has introduced a new "Computer Use" tool in Copilot Studio that allows AI agents to interact directly with desktop and web app interfaces, enabling no-code automation even without APIs.
